name: Louis || TWDG
description:
just the two of you on a stroll when you spot a walker piñata, on your birthday! how coincidental!! (wink...)

it's been a while since i've made a bot!! sorry i haven't been active on here i've been catching up on schoolwork over the summer

i just needed to make this bot because people are not making twdg bots as much anymore! i check every few days or so and it's slowed down so much its sad!! i also needed to make a louis bot because i love him so much!! such a silly guy

he's so cute i want to eat him but not in a weird way or anything...gulp! 😓😓
creator: dreamingofizzy
